title: Barça vs Atlético: wild atmosphere as the Catalans arrive at the stadium (video)
fullText: Story byBarça vs Atlético: wild atmosphere as the Catalans arrive at the stadium (video)Remontada vibes at Camp Nou as Barça players arriveBarça vs Atlético: wild atmosphere as the Catalans arrive at the stadium (video)Tonight, Barça hosts Atlético Madrid for the second leg of the Champions League semi-final.After being thoroughly outplayed by Atlético Madrid (0-4) in the first leg, FC Barcelona welcomes the Madrid side this Tuesday at Camp Nou for the second leg of the Copa del Rey semi-final. One thing is certain: the Catalan faithful believe in a sensational comeback.As the Blaugrana team bus pulled up, Barça fans turned up the heat outside the stadium.
